title: 边栏控制
completionRule: Complete only when the Card and floating controller share one Shell state, every legacy button/lock/drag state and frozen trigger/reset extension is covered, canonical TOML persistence is atomic, hidden work is zero and desktop/constrained Chromium proves the active image is not remounted.

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 浮动控制器设置
acceptanceItems: 重置控制器位置 icon button
Card 内操作不触发阅读快捷键

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 四边状态概览
acceptanceItems: open 未 pinned 使用 secondary variant
关闭未 pinned 使用 outline variant
锁定后不会自动隐藏说明

sourceUiInventory.title: 浮动控制器外壳与四边按钮
acceptanceItems: 控制器 mousedown 不冒泡

sourceUiInventory.title: 四边三态锁定与视觉状态
acceptanceItems: 左右锁定展开同步 open=true
左右锁定隐藏同步 open=false
单击解除 false 锁定再切 open

sourceUiInventory.title: 浮动控制器拖动与位置持久化
acceptanceItems: 窗口尺寸变化后位置重新钳制
触摸 PointerEvent 等价拖动
键盘位置调整等价入口

sourceUiInventory.title: 设置默认值、同步与 Shell 扩展
acceptanceItems: Card 与 Layer 监听同一设置
外部设置更新实时同步
Layer 卸载取消 12 个 store subscriptions
未知未来 Shell 配置保留

sourceUiInventory.title: 通用 Card 外壳与迁移边界
acceptanceItems: PanelLeft 图标与边栏控制标题
折叠时 Card 内容零挂载
浮动 Layer 不随 Card 折叠卸载
Layer 与 Reader 打开路径延迟边界
Reader 热翻页预算不回退

items.title: 启停浮动边栏控制器
items.targetContract: The Card switch and floating layer share one enabled state; disabling removes the controller DOM without changing edge state.
items.notes: The present component proves only the isolated callback shape; runtime composition is pending.

items.title: 恢复浮动控制器默认位置
items.targetContract: Reset restores the canonical bounded default position x=100,y=100 and persists it once without remounting the reader image.
items.notes: Runtime persistence and image identity evidence remain.

items.title: Card 显示四边 open/pin 状态
items.targetContract: The 2x2 Card grid displays and controls top/right/bottom/left edge state from the active Reader Shell.
items.notes: Formal ReaderPanelContext and Shell composition are pending.

items.title: 渲染可拖动浮动控制层
items.targetContract: An enabled, deferred floating controller renders above the Reader viewport with one drag handle and four edge controls.
items.notes: The target currently has no floating layer.

items.title: 切换四边瞬态展开状态
items.targetContract: Top, right, bottom and left controls open or close the same ReaderEdgeShell surface without mutating unrelated configuration.
items.notes: ReaderEdgeShell currently owns transient visibility internally and needs a controlled bridge.

items.title: 切换四边固定状态
items.targetContract: All four edges update canonical pinned configuration; keyboard/touch users receive an explicit equivalent to legacy right click.
items.notes: Top/bottom callbacks exist only in the isolated Card and left/right runtime persistence is pending.

items.title: 保持自动/锁定展开/锁定隐藏三态
items.targetContract: Each floating edge action cycles auto, locked-open and locked-hidden with stable color, icon, title and pinned/open effects.
items.notes: XR may use an explicit menu instead of right-click-only cycling but must preserve all three states.

items.title: 配置自动隐藏与展开行为
items.targetContract: The Card can return each edge to automatic hover behavior and expose current open/initial-visible semantics without duplicating ReaderEdgeShell state.
items.notes: Frozen target extension beyond the legacy Card controls.

items.title: 配置四边触发区
items.targetContract: Four bounded trigger sizes use the canonical Shell configuration and update ReaderEdgeShell without reload.
items.notes: Frozen target extension; numeric bounds and reset behavior require characterization.

items.title: 恢复边栏控制默认布局
items.targetContract: One explicit reset restores controller position and known edge defaults while preserving unknown future Shell/Card configuration.
items.notes: Frozen target extension; reset must be one atomic configuration PATCH.

items.title: 有界拖动浮动控制器
items.targetContract: Pointer, touch and keyboard movement remain within the viewport, update only transient DOM during movement and persist once on completion.
items.notes: The legacy mouse-only implementation is expanded to PointerEvent and keyboard equivalence.

items.title: 默认、open、pinned、disabled 与错误状态
items.targetContract: Card and layer expose coherent default, hover, focus, open, pinned, locked, disabled, pending, error and rollback states.
items.notes: Pending/error/rollback and runtime states remain.

items.title: 共享 Card 与 Shell 外壳行为
items.targetContract: Sidebar Control is an independently lazy, hideable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable control-panel Card.
items.notes: The component exists but is not registered in the formal Card manifest.

items.title: 共享规范 Shell 控制契约
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share enabled, position, edge enabled/visible/pinned/trigger and lock semantics through one bounded application configuration contract.
items.notes: Runtime Shell DTO lacks floating-controller and controlled-visibility fields.

items.title: 导入并原子持久化到 nodes.neoview
items.targetContract: Legacy view.sidebarControl imports once; canonical enabled/position/edge state lives under [nodes.neoview], with pointer completion and reset producing one atomic PATCH.
items.notes: No second runtime settings version or xiranite.db business table is allowed.

items.title: 懒加载、监听释放与取消
items.targetContract: Hidden Card content is unmounted, disabled layer is zero DOM, all global pointer/listener work is released and stale configuration responses cannot overwrite newer interaction.
items.notes: The target must not keep window pointer listeners after cancel/unmount.

items.title: 键盘、触摸与语义等价操作
items.targetContract: Every icon has an accessible name; open/pin/lock expose state; touch and keyboard can invoke legacy context actions and move the controller with focus preserved.
items.notes: The isolated Card has labels but the floating layer and explicit lock menu are pending.

items.title: Card 与浮动层响应式几何
items.targetContract: The legacy 2x2 Card density and compact horizontal floating controller remain readable and operable on desktop and 420x360 Card viewports without overlap.
items.notes: Both viewports require screenshots and zero overflow/occlusion assertions.

items.title: 边栏控制不重挂活动阅读图像
items.targetContract: Enable, drag, open, pin, lock, trigger and reset operations preserve the active Reader image node and asset URL.
items.notes: Required by the frozen functional scope.

items.title: DOM、写入与 chunk 边界
items.targetContract: O(1) Card/layer DOM, zero hidden work, DOM-only pointermove, one completion PATCH and independent deferred Card/layer chunks within explicit budgets.
items.notes: Reader entry and hot page-turn budgets must remain green.

items.title: 记录受控 Shell 与可访问性扩展
items.targetContract: Document controlled ReaderEdgeShell state, PointerEvent/keyboard movement, explicit lock actions, canonical TOML and trigger/reset controls as target improvements without removing legacy states.
items.notes: Legacy right click remains supported but is not the only lock path.
